encounters.chief_complaint: Sudden onset weakness, speech difficulty, facial droop

orders.display_name: NPO: NPO until swallowing assessment completed
DVT_prophylaxis: Sequential compression devices (avoid anticoagulant DVT prophylaxis first 24h)
BP_management: Permissive hypertension: allow SBP < 220 (or < 185 if tPA given)
neuro_checks: NIHSS q2h for first 24h, then q4h
continuous_telemetry: Cardiac monitoring for AF detection x48h minimum
HOB_elevation: Head of bed flat or 30 degrees per protocol
